name: W6 Push Morning Flow
description: 12 min. Same overhead priority as W5. Adding band external rotations for shoulder health — the twinge might be gone but prevention is cheap.

exercises.notes: Kneeling, cross-body external rotation. Rotator cuff maintenance — especially for the right shoulder.
Back flat against wall. Compare to W4 — should be noticeably easier/deeper.
Up from 6 in W5. Mimics push press shoulder angle.
30s each side. Hip flexors + thoracic — push press prep.
30s each side. Fourth week doing this — should be deep and natural.

tips: 12 min — band external rotation is new. Rotator cuff maintenance for the right shoulder.
Pike push-ups up to 8 reps — building overhead pressing pattern.
Thread-the-needle should feel like home by now.
If short on time: shoulder health block + pike push-ups. 5 min.
